notes: |
  Strong commission that cleanly removes the Dispatch package and integrates push into seal(). New tests in scriptorium-core.test.ts cover happy path, no-op seal, and push failure with good assertions (error message distinction, draft survival, local state verification). The push logic is duplicated across two seal paths in scriptorium-core.ts (no-op and normal ff) — minor extraction opportunity. Error handling is solid: "Push failed after successful seal" gives callers a distinct signal, and push-before-abandon preserves drafts for inspection. Test and code style perfectly match surrounding conventions.
